_comment: Panda Diplomacy Dataset Schema — Phase 1 placeholder. Actual data populated in Phase 3.

schema.era_tag: One of: Gift Era (1957-1982) | Short Lease Era (1982-1994) | Modern Conservation Lease Era (1994-Present)

cubs.repatriation_date: Date returned to China (YYYY-MM-DD or null if still abroad)

pandas.lease_end_date: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY or null if open-ended
pandas.physical_return_date: Actual date pandas left host country (may differ from lease end)
pandas.recall_reason: One of: Lease Expiry | Wild Panda Conservation Policy | Bilateral Political Tension | Zoo Funding Failure | null (still active)
pandas.bilateral_context: Free-text: e.g. '1972 Nixon thaw — pandas given after historic China visit'
